青岛中能 Jonoon clubs from China that teams playing during Gothia China 2018.
They participated with team Boys
addition 青岛中能 Jonoon, other teams from different countries played Boys They were divided into different groups, whereof 青岛中能 Jonoon could found Group together with 上海大学附属学校 affiliated Geomcheon Singapore Sports School新加坡体校 吉林市队 Jilin
青岛中能 Jonoon continued Playoff after reaching 2:nd place Group playoff they made Semi final, lost against 上海申花 Shanghai Shenhua with 1-4.
Final, 上海申花 Shanghai Shenhua over 深圳宝安体校 Baoan sports became winner Playoff Boys

"Bei Bistu Shein" (Yiddish: ביסטו שיין‎, You're Beautiful") popular Yiddish song composed Jacob Jacobs (lyricist) Sholom Secunda (composer) 1932 Yiddish comedy musical, Would Could Yiddish, Lebn Lost Nisht, "You could live, they don't you"), which closed after season Parkway Theatre Brooklyn, York City).
score song transcribed Yiddish title "Bay bistu sheyn".
Over time, song grossed some million, with Secunda Jacobs missing significant royalties.
1961, copyright song expired, ownership reverted Secunda Jacobs, signed contract with Harms, Inc., securing proper royalties.
